jobPostingInfo.title: Lab Power Platform Development Intern
jobPostingInfo.jobDescription:
Job Description:

ABOUT TTI

Techtronic Industries is a fast-growing world leader in Power Tools, Accessories, Hand Tools, Outdoor Power Equipment, and Floor Care for Do-It-Yourself (DIY), professional and industrial users in the home improvement, repair, maintenance, construction, and infrastructure industries. The Company is committed to accelerating the transformation of these industries through superior environmentally friendly cordless technology. At TTI Anderson, our brands RYOBI and HART are recognized worldwide for their deep heritage and cordless product platforms of superior quality, outstanding performance, safety, productivity, and compelling innovation.

JOB SUMMARY

The Power Platform development intern supports, maintains, and builds power platform and other software tools for testing and testing operations. The position will interact with cross-functional teams while interfacing with IT to ensure lab related software follows best practices around security and programming.

RESPONSIBILITIES / SKILLS

  • Program, implement, and upgrade software solutions that improve the efficiency, quality, and speed of product testing operations
  • Collaborate with IT and Business Operations groups on best practices
  • Prepare specifications, documentation, and logic diagrams of programs and applications
  • Design, code, test, troubleshoot, debug, and document lab programs and applications
  • Focus software solutions on end user experience and lab team pain points
  • Collaborate with other internal development teams
  • Adhere to timelines within fast paced and ever evolving environment
  • Demonstrated project management skills -- must be organized and pay excellent attention to detail
  • Team player with a positive approach to problem solving
  • Creative yet practical problem solving and decision-making skills
  • Strong planning skills with sense of urgency
  • Strong analytical and interpretative skills
  • Ability to self-direct on projects and tasks
  • Excellent oral and written communication skills
  • Coding proficiency in one or more of the following languages: Power FX, SQL, Python, .Net, HTML
  • Development of PowerApps for business applications

EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

  • High School Diploma, GED, or equivalent
  • Degree or Pursuing Degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or Related Field
  • 0-3 Years of Experience
